sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13322" key="a)ponu/mfhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπονύμφης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπονόστ-νυμφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n13322.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μισογύνης</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
